title: Claude Plugins
mode: teach-me (build-along possible later; self-building plugin is the stretch goal)

gates: status never past 'built' while deck/guide missing

cursor.nextAction: 101 complete. Next: live-iterate educate via the local marketplace, and/or start 102 (hooks & MCP servers in depth).

lessons.title: Plugin foundations & anatomy (applied to the Learnings project)
lessons.motivator: Evan sees that Learnings is becoming a plugin; needs to understand what a plugin actually is before specing one — and resolve where the CLAUDE.md orchestration layer goes.
lessons.feedsForward: A spec for the first artifact: the Learnings/educate plugin, ideally one that can build itself.
decisions: Plugin = packaging; the fixed menu (skills/commands/agents/hooks/mcp) does the work; manifest is a label, not a brain.

CLAUDE.md has no always-on plugin slot -> resolution: the plugin INSTALLS a project CLAUDE.md (always-on for free). Logic -> skills/lesson; always-on copy -> templates/CLAUDE.md planted by skills/start.
Drop the git pre-commit gate; gate via a Claude Stop hook on auditable artifacts (git-agnostic).
Reference teach-me/build-me rather than vendoring (revisit later).
gotchas: Plugin hooks fire GLOBALLY -> gate must no-op outside educate projects.
--check flags stale maps (normal mid-work) -> added read-only --gate that blocks only on DoD violations.
Stop hooks must honor stop_hook_active or they loop forever.
progress.mjs used import.meta.url as its location -> had to decouple (resolve root via --root/env/walk-up) to live in a plugin.
Self-build is honest only for structure+manifest+frontmatter; bodies/scripts/templates are authored payload.

build.location: /Users/evanstern/Claude/Projects/Code/educate (own git repo, master, v0.1.0) — see topics/claude-plugins/build/README.md pointer
build.status: built + verified end-to-end; packaged as educate.plugin (Cowork) + marketplace.json (Claude Code local-dev)
